headline: Cardinal Health Deepens Actinium-225 Role As Board Leadership Shifts
summary: Cardinal Health (NYSE:CAH) is expanding production capacity for the medical radioisotope Actinium-225 to support targeted alpha therapies for cancer treatment worldwide. The company is positioning this capacity for both clinical trials and potential commercial manufacturing in global markets. Cardinal Health announced that Patricia A. Hemingway Hall has been appointed Chair of the Board, following a period of company transformation. The leadership change and Actinium-225 expansion were...
